sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19515" key="baru/xeilos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰρῠ´-χειλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19515.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thick-lipped,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.20</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ammian.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
